text: Artificial intelligence is changing the world, but it also raises important ethical questions. One major concern is bias. AI systems can learn unfair patterns from data, leading to discrimination against certain groups. To address this, fairness must be a priority when designing algorithms. Privacy is another key issue, as AI often collects large amounts of personal information that requires careful protection. Transparency is equally important—people should understand how AI makes decisions, especially in areas like job applications or loan approvals. Finally, responsible AI development involves creating systems that respect human values and rights. By focusing on these principles, we can ensure that technology benefits everyone equally.
